name: phase11_generation_preview
outcome_goal: Preview generated apps before saving, with Accept/Regenerate/Edit buttons

jobs.label: p11_app_preview
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create src/grid/AppPreview.tsx:

A preview overlay that shows a generated manifest before saving it permanently.

Props: { manifest: V2 manifest object, explanation: string, confidence: number, onAccept: () => void, onRegenerate: () => void, onEdit: () => void, onClose: () => void }

Layout:
- Full-screen overlay (position fixed, z-index 1000, dark backdrop)
- Content card (max-width 1200px, centered, max-height 90vh, overflow-y auto)
- Header: 'Preview: Generated App' + confidence badge + close X
- Explanation text in a subtle box
- Scaled-down QuadrantGrid preview (60% scale via CSS transform)
- Action bar at bottom: 'Accept & Save' (primary), 'Regenerate' (default), 'Edit JSON' (subtle)

Styling: dark theme, matches existing design tokens.

Also wire it into IntentBoxModule.tsx:
- After successful generation, instead of immediately navigating, show AppPreview
- Accept: navigate to the generated manifest
- Regenerate: call generate again with same intent
- Edit: navigate to manifest editor with target=generated_id

Create src/grid/AppPreview.css for styles.
Write all files.
